prompt: Update my installed Teamwork skills on this machine and initialize Teamwork context for this project. Do not publish a package version.
must: check source and installed freshness before refreshing
refresh global Teamwork surfaces with the sourced profile, then use init-project only for requested project context without local package copies
rerun readiness until current or report exact remaining actions
must_not: create a release commit, tag, or GitHub Release
install unrelated project packages or external tooling
evidence: Static user-refresh contract; it does not prove live host behavior.
